Interface IUNTraceResults5

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Provides access to utility network trace results 5.

[Guid("B47C0195-073A-40FF-82F8-D98DB52B6ACB")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IUNTraceResults5 : IUNTraceResults4, IUNTraceResults3, IUNTraceResults2, IUNTraceResults
